titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Mexico ( (Norweb))

div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Mexico ( Norweb )
div.p: Sir: Attached is a copy of an informal memorandumNot printed; for substance, see memorandum of January 21, from the American Ambassador to the Chief of the Department of Political Affairs, Mexican Ministry for Foreign Affairs, p. 752. that has been prepared for use by Ambassador Daniels when he returns to Mexico City. The Ambassador thinks, and the Department concurs, that you might tactfully employ portions of the memorandum in an informal conversation with Mr. SierraManuel J. Sierra, Chief of the Department of Political Affairs, Ministry for Foreign Affairs. prior to the Ambassador’s return, in order that the Mexican officials may be giving the matter further thought preparatory to a definite termination of the negotiations at an early date. It is particularly desirable that Mr. Sierra should be tactfully told that we do not feel that we can postpone beyond February 1 the beginning of the filing of memorials.
div.closer:
For the Secretary of State:
Wilbur J. Carr
